title: %u not supported in $fatal
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Issue: 989 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2015-11-03
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

initial begin
assert (0 != 1) else
$fatal(2, "%u", 20);
end

I'll fix this at some point, just tracking here so I don't forget about it.
